'''razudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readcount|readcount]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readcount|readcount]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| razudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræzidhith|ræzidhith]] || [[word:ræzidhij|ræzidhij]] || [[word:ræzidhish|ræzidhish]] || [[word:ræzidhi|ræzidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:razuzudhuth|razuzudhuth]] || [[word:razuzudhuj|razuzudhuj]] || [[word:razuzudhush|razuzudhush]] || [[word:razuzudhu|razuzudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:razudhuth|razudhuth]] || [[word:razudhuj|razudhuj]] || [[word:razudhush|razudhush]] || [[word:razudhu|razudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:razufdhuth|razufdhuth]] || [[word:razufdhuj|razufdhuj]] || [[word:razufdhush|razufdhush]] || [[word:razufdhuf|razufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:razudhuthu|razudhuthu]] || [[word:razudhuju|razudhuju]] || [[word:razudhushu|razudhushu]] || [[word:razudhuku|razudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:razudhuth|razudhuth]] || [[word:razudhuj|razudhuj]] || [[word:razudhush|razudhush]] || [[word:razudhu|razudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:razudhuthul|razudhuthul]] || [[word:razudhujul|razudhujul]] || [[word:razudhushul|razudhushul]] || [[word:razudhukul|razudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:razudhuthuthu|razudhuthuthu]] || [[word:razudhujuju|razudhujuju]] || [[word:razudhushushu|razudhushushu]] || [[word:razudhuku|razudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:razudhuthun|razudhuthun]] || [[word:razudhujun|razudhujun]] || [[word:razudhushun|razudhushun]] || [[word:razudhukun|razudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:razudhuthuoro|razudhuthuoro]] || [[word:razudhujuoro|razudhujuoro]] || [[word:razudhushuoro|razudhushuoro]] || [[word:razudhukuoro|razudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
